# terrible_community_general_redis_data (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `key` (String) Database key.

### Optional

- `existing` (Boolean) Only set key if it already exists.
- `expiration` (Number) Expiration time in milliseconds. Setting this option always results in a change in the database.
- `keep_ttl` (Boolean) Retain the time to live associated with the key.
- `non_existing` (Boolean) Only set key if it does not already exist.
- `state` (String) State of the key.
- `value` (String) Value that key should be set to.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A short message.
- `old_value` (String) Value of key before setting.
